properties.name: Pakistan Border (international)
properties.source: Survey of India + BSF (Pakistan border) + state gazettes
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. The classification's actual boundary crosses districts; refer to the cited source for the authoritative line.

facts: Barmer, Jaisalmer, Bikaner and Sri Ganganagar together form Rajasthan's 1070 km international border with Pakistan.
The border is fully fenced and floodlit — India's only fully-illuminated international border.
BSF operates the border; Jaisalmer district hosts a large BSF training academy.

properties.border_km: ~1070 km — Rajasthan has India's longest state border with Pakistan

properties.name: Punjab Border
properties.source: Survey of India + BSF (Pakistan border) + state gazettes
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. The classification's actual boundary crosses districts; refer to the cited source for the authoritative line.

facts: Sri Ganganagar and Hanumangarh share a short border with Punjab — the Gang Canal enters Rajasthan through this border.
This is the smallest of Rajasthan's six border segments.

properties.name: Haryana Border
properties.source: Survey of India + BSF (Pakistan border) + state gazettes
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. The classification's actual boundary crosses districts; refer to the cited source for the authoritative line.

facts: The longest interstate border — runs from Sri Ganganagar in the northwest across the Shekhawati belt to Bharatpur.
Includes the Mewat cultural region shared with Haryana's Nuh.

properties.name: Uttar Pradesh Border
properties.source: Survey of India + BSF (Pakistan border) + state gazettes
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. The classification's actual boundary crosses districts; refer to the cited source for the authoritative line.

facts: Runs from Bharatpur east and south to the Chambal.
The Yamuna-Chambal confluence lies on this border.

properties.name: Madhya Pradesh Border
properties.source: Survey of India + BSF (Pakistan border) + state gazettes
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. The classification's actual boundary crosses districts; refer to the cited source for the authoritative line.

facts: Rajasthan's longest state border — runs the length of the Chambal river gorge and the Vindhyan plateau.
The Gandhi Sagar reservoir straddles this border.
Includes the Ratapani-Sariska tiger corridor via Ranthambore.

properties.name: Gujarat Border
properties.source: Survey of India + BSF (Pakistan border) + state gazettes
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. The classification's actual boundary crosses districts; refer to the cited source for the authoritative line.

facts: Runs across southern Rajasthan from the Rann of Kutch fringe to the Mahi basin.
The Mahi Bajaj Sagar project delivers water across this border to Gujarat's northern districts.
